import io
import list
import string

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(line, i)
    if is_ws_byte(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      let start = i
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          let bb = byte_or_zero(line, i)
          if is_ws_byte(bb)
            done = true
          else
            i = i + 1
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let total = nums.len()
let take = if k > total
  total
else
  k
end

mut remaining = nums
mut picked: List<Int> = []
mut count = 0
mut stop = false
while count < take and not stop
  match list.max(remaining)
  when Some(m)
    picked = list.push(picked, m)
    match list.index_of(remaining, m)
    when Some(idx)
      remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
    when None
      stop = true
    end
  when None
    stop = true
  end
  count = count + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in picked
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
